name: The Voice from the Well: The Velessar Saga
short_description: The Voice from the Well is a fantasy adventure visual novel with multiple endings. Stranded in a foreign world, Jay must fight to reclaim his stolen memories as mysterious forces conspire!
detailed_description:
Stranded in a foreign world, Jay must fight to reclaim his stolen memories as mysterious forces conspire!
The Voice from the Well: The Velessar Saga is an adaption of the improved first arc of the Velessar Saga book series. Set in a fantasy realm inspired by historical dark ages Scandinavia and filled with mystery.

Soon-to-be seventh grader Jay finds himself stranded in a dark forest. Taking shelter in the nearby lighthouse, something approaches him from the deep darkness that will change his life forever. The following day, he finds himself unable to remember what happened that night or anything from before the previous day. Jay sets out to reclaim his lost memories and find a way to return home as mysterious forces conspire!

Player choice

Choices made throughout the game will affect the story and lead to alternate endings and new scenes not found in the books.

Fully voiced cast

The diverse cast of characters from The Voice from the Well has been brought to life with voice acting for each character! With an immersive soundtrack and sound effects, headphones are highly recommended!
